prompt: A high-end Japanese skincare advertisement for a moisturizing lotion, shot in a luminous soft-white studio with a clean airy beauty aesthetic. On the right half of the image, a close-up portrait of a young East Asian woman with flawless dewy skin, natural glossy lips, subtle peach-toned makeup, dark brown eyes, and dark hair loosely tied back with a few wispy strands across her forehead. She smiles gently at the camera and rests one hand against her cheek, wearing a simple white sleeveless top. On the left half, place 1 tall transparent frosted bottle of lotion standing upright on a reflective water surface, with tiny water droplets on the bottle and a shiny silver cap. The bottle label reads "SUIREN" and "MOISTURIZING LOTION". Surround the bottle with 3 pale pink cherry blossoms: 2 clustered at the lower left corner and 1 floating near the bottom center-right. Add faint sparkles and soft reflections in the water. Use a pastel palette of white, pearl, blush pink, and very light blue-gray, with diffused daylight, silky skin retouching, shallow depth of field, and a premium cosmetic campaign look. Include Japanese ad copy on the left in elegant black Mincho-style typography: a large 2-line headline reading "触れたくなる、" and "透明感。"; beneath it, 2 smaller lines reading "うるおい満ちて、" and "澄みわたる素肌へ。"; a thin outlined circle containing 2 stacked phrases with an × between them, "高保湿" and "透明感". In the lower right, add small Japanese text "うるおいが、私を輝かせる。" above the brand name "SUIREN" and the subtitle "MOISTURIZING LOTION". Composition should feel balanced and luxurious, like a magazine-ready spring skincare poster.
